description: Agent tool hierarchy and operational sandbox boundaries. All AI agents must follow these rules when selecting tools and accessing resources.

platform_tools.description: Layer 1: Platform built-in tools preferred over Bash equivalents.

cli_preferences.description: Layer 2: When Bash is required, prefer AI-friendly CLI tools for lower error rates.

text_search.reason: Default recursive, respects .gitignore, stable output format

yaml_processing.reason: MUST NOT use fragile regex on YAML structure

text_replacement.reason: Safer syntax when heavy escaping is needed

http_json_request.reason: Native JSON syntax, fewer quoting errors

native_first_rule: MUST use local tools (Read/Edit/Write/Bash, repo knowledge/guides/specs) before considering MCP or external tools.
mcp_unnecessary_conditions: Local shell or repo search can answer
Simple text replacement or local file edit
mcp_acceptable_conditions: Need latest official docs for external packages
Need external system response for contract/auth verification
Need observable record of high-risk decision
